Acceptance Criteria: As a user, I want to search for products by name so that i can find exactly what i am looking for
Searching for a valid product name
Given that the user navigates in the product page
When the user type a valid product name (e.g., “Jeans“) in the search bar
And click the “Search“ icon
Then the user redirected to the product results page
And the page should display all products that match “Jeans“
Searching for a partial word
Given that the user navigates in the product page
When the user type a partial word (e.g., “Jea“) in the search bar
And click the “Search“ icon
Then the user should redirected to the result page
And the page should display all products that match “Jean“
Searching for product name using ALL CAPS
Given that the user navigates in the product page
When the user type a valid product name in ALL CAPS(e.g., “JEANS“) in the search bar
And click the “Search“ icon
Then the user redirected to the product results page
And the page should display all products that match “JEANS“
User leaving the search bar empty and try to hit the “Search“ icon
Given that the user navigates in the product page
When the user leaves the search bar completely empty
And click the “Search“ icon
Then the user redirected to the results page that shows all the products
As a user, I want to sort the product by brands and category so that i can find exactly product that i want
Filtering product by Brand
Given that the user navigates on the products page
When the user select a brand name in “Brands“ product sidebar (e.g., “Polo“)
Then the user redirected to the page where display only products from the selected brand
User select what category they want to find
Given that the user navigates on the products page
When the user click the “+“ icon in the category sidebar
Then the category should expand to show sub-categories (e.g., “Dress“, “Tops“)
When the user select a category product from drop down list
Then the user redirected to the page where display only products from the selected sub-category
